title: S.O.2316(E)- Amendment notification
text: 4492 GI/2017 (1) REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 EXTRAORDINARY II— 3— (ii) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY . 2051] No. 2051] NEW DELHI, TUESDAY, JULY 25, 2017/SRAVANA 3, 1939 स् वास्् य र पर वा कल्या ण मत्राला य (भा तीयखाद्यसु क्ष ार तानकप्राधिक ण म) अधिसूचना नईदिल् ी , 24 जु ाई, 2017 का.आ. 2316(अ).—खाद्यसु क्ष ार तानकअधिधनयत , 2006 (2006 का 34)कीिा ा 43 कीउप -िा ा( 1)द्व ा ाप्रित्त कधतियय काप्रयग क त ुए भा तीय खाद्यसु क्ष ार तानकप्राधिक ण मभा तक ाजपराल , असािा ण म, भा II, ख्ड3 , उप-ख्ड (ii) तें दिना्क 6दिस्ब , 2016 कगप्रकाधकतअधिसूचनास्ख्या का .आ. 3648(अ)तें तद्द्वा ाधन न ध धखत स्कगिनक ताहै , अर्ाात्: — ताध कातें , िधक्षण मक्ष राल सस्ब्धित ‘ ’ तें, तधत नाडुकनीच , कॉ त( 1)तेंक्रतस्ख्या 13 र कॉ त ( 2)र (3)तेंउससस्ब्धितप्रधवधिय क स्र्ानप धन न ध धखत खाजा ा , अर्ाात् :— क्र त स्. प्र यग का ाकानात , प्जीक ण मस्ख्या र पता प्रत् या यनकास्व रूप प (1) (2) (3) ‘’13. टीैब् सप्रा इवे वटध धतटड , च न्नई प्जीक ण म स्ख्या . 9/ स/ फ स स आई/2014 न्.270कर 270ख , बतााका गनी , 4 त न गड, प र् ु ड़ी, च न्नई –600096 ासायधनक जैधवक’’। [फा. स्. 12015/02/2017-क्यू . .(भा -I)] पवनअग्रवा , तुख्य कायाका ीअधिका ी रटप्पण म : तू अधिसूचनाभा त क ाजपराल , असािा ण म, भा II, ख्ड3 , उप-ख्ड (ii) तेंका .आ. 3648(अ), दिना्क6 दिस्ब , 2016द्व ा ाप्रकाधकतुएईर्ीर बाितेंउसकाधन न ध धखतअधिसूचनास्ख्या्क द्व ा ास्कगिनुएआ : (i) का.आ. 567(अ), दिना्क20फ व ी , 2017; (ii) का.आ. 1595(अ), दिना्क15तई , 2017; र (iii) का.आ. 1965(अ), दिना्क20जून , 2017। -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Food Safety and Standards Authority of India) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 24th July, 2017 S.O. 2316(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 43 of the Food Safety and Standards Act, 2006 (34 of 2006), the Food Safety and Standards Authority of India hereby makes the following amendment in the notification number S.O. 3648(E) published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), dated the 6th December, 2016, namely:— In the table, in ‘C’ related to SOUTHERN REGION, under Tamil Nadu, for serial number 13 in column (1) and respective entries in columns (2) and (3), the following shall be substituted, namely:— Sr. No. Name, Regn. Number and Address of the Laboratory Scope of accreditation (1) (2) (3) “13. TA Labs Private Limited, Chennai Reg. No. 9/S/FSSAI/2014 No. 270 A & 270 B, Burma Colony, 4th Main Road, Perungudi, Chennai–600 096 Chemical Biological” [F. No. 12015/02/2017-QA (Pt-I)] PAWAN AGARWAL, Chief Executive Officer Note : The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), vide notification No. S.O. 3648(E), dated the 6th December, 2016 and subsequently amended vide notification numbers: (i) S.O. 567(E), dated the 20th February, 2017; (ii) S.O. 1595(E), dated the 15th May, 2017; and (iii) S.O. 1965(E), dated the 20th June, 2017. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
